    arr = [3, 1, 2, 5, 4]
    expected_result = 4  # kth(4th smallest element in the sorted array [1, 2, 3, 4, 5])
    assert kth(arr, 3) == expected_result, f"Expected kth({arr}, 3) to return {expected_result}, but got {kth(arr, 3)}."
